zh.Eresby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Willoughby於1240年出生在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比時，他的父親Robert de Willoughby24歲，母親Margaret Orreby30歲。他於1259年之前與Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1300年3月29日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比享年60歲，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Willoughby于1240年出生在英国林可爾史爾維洛賀比时，他的父亲Robert de Willoughby24岁，母亲Margaret Orreby30岁。他于1259年之前与Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1300年3月29日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比享年60岁，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Willoughby was born in 1240, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Robert de Willoughby, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Orreby, was 30. He married Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby before 1259, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 March 1300, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

Il a épousé Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby avant 1259, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1300, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

Lui sposato Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby prima del 1259, nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ko.Burial Details Unknown: 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Willoughby(이)가 1240년 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Willoughby(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Orreby(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1259년 이전 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년 3월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby antes 1259, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire: уиллоугби он т волдс, ноттингхамшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Willoughby родился в 1240 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Willoughby было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Orreby, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby перед 1259 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 марта 1300 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан.
